features.title: Configuration Error Intelligence
features.description: Surfaces misconfigured campaign settings in a unified view and navigates users directly to the offending field with an in-context highlight — eliminating the need to understand SDK contracts or engineering terminology, and cutting support escalations for non-technical operators.

features.title: Event Sanity — Live SDK Debugger
features.description: Reduced campaign debugging time by 92% by delivering a self-serve, real-time stream of mobile and SDK event logs inside the platform — enabling business and QA teams to validate event sequences, inspect payloads, and catch misconfigurations before production, with zero developer involvement.

features.title: Design Editor UI
features.description: Replaced a form-heavy, developer-assisted campaign workflow with a Figma-inspired visual editor — giving marketers direct control over typography, layout, and design tokens to ship polished, on-brand experiences independently, measurably improving customer satisfaction and cutting campaign iteration time from days to hours.
